summary: Horizontal video. The same JFK clip re-shared by PressSec with a caption referring to Democrats as 'anti-law enforcement'. The video is grainy fixed-camera security/CCTV footage of an ICE/TSA officer reviving an unresponsive infant at a crowded airport checkpoint, with no graphics, titles, color grading, or music. There is no music track.
notable_text: Tweet: 'Democrats are anti-law enforcement... a hero ICE agent jumped into action and restored an infant's breathing'
